{{Quote|Return to the ''Chaf Envoy'' and signal ''drace-two'' alert. Then order the Number Two Honor Squad to report to this chamber. They must be standing ready in the event we require immediate assistance.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Prard'ras'kleoni]]|<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />}}
'''Number Two Honor Squad''' was a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of 6 [[Chiss warrior/Legends|Chiss warriors]] who had been stationed aboard ''[[Chaf Envoy]]'' to serve as part of an [[Chaf'orm'bintrano's honor guard|honor guard]] for the vessel's journey to ''[[Outbound Flight]]''<ref name="Survivor's Quest" /> in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' to [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]].</ref>

{{Chiss-stub}}
